summary: Backend API testing completed for Payment Link Accepted Currencies feature. All 12 tests passed successfully.

minor.issue: Returns accepted_currencies as comma-separated string instead of array. GET /api/pay/links/:id returns it as array. Minor inconsistency in response format.

action_items: Consider normalizing accepted_currencies response format: createPaymentLink returns string 'BTC,ETH' while getPaymentLinkById returns array ['BTC', 'ETH']. Both work but inconsistent.
critical_code_review_comments: Code implementation is solid - proper validation for invalid crypto types and unconfigured wallets
Database column uses TEXT type with comma-separated values - acceptable for this use case
Redis sync properly updates available_currencies when payment link is updated
seed_data_creation: Test payment links created during testing were cleaned up automatically
context_for_next_testing_agent: All accepted_currencies feature endpoints tested and working. Company 38 has configured: BTC, ETH, LTC, DOGE, TRX, USDT-TRC20, USDT-ERC20. BCH and USDC-ERC20 are NOT configured.

tests_executed.test_get_company_currencies_success: PASSED - Returns all 9 crypto types with configuration status
tests_executed.test_create_payment_link_with_accepted_c: PASSED - Creates link with specific currencies
tests_executed.test_create_payment_link_without_accepte: PASSED - Creates link with null (all configured)
